have h₁ : (Circuit.eval  (Circuit.assert_range e c h)) = (h.eval) := by
      simp [Circuit.eval, Exp.eval, assertions]
      <;>
      (try decide) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try simp_all [Fact.out])
      <;>
      (try omega)
    have h₂ : (Cs.eval (wrap (to_wg (Circuit.assert_range e c h)) (to_cs (Circuit.assert_range e c h)))) = (Cs.eval (to_cs h)) := by
      simp [to_wg, to_cs, wrap]
      <;> rfl
    have h₃ : (Cs.eval (to_cs h)) = (h.eval) := by
      apply soundness
    have h₄ : (Circuit.eval (Circuit.assert_range e c h)) = (Cs.eval (wrap (to_wg (Circuit.assert_range e c h)) (to_cs (Circuit.assert_range e c h)))) := by
      calc
        (Circuit.eval (Circuit.assert_range e c h)) = (h.eval) := h₁
        _ = (Cs.eval (to_cs h)) := by rw [h₃]
        _ = (Cs.eval (wrap (to_wg (Circuit.assert_range e c h)) (to_cs (Circuit.assert_range e c h)))) := by
          rw [h₂]
    exact h₄

simp_all [Circuit.eval, to_cs, to_wg, wrap, assert_range]

    (try aesop) <;>
    (try simp_all [Exp.eval]) <;>
    (try ring_nf at *) <;>
    (try norm_num at *) <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try
      {
        constructor <;>
        (try simp_all [Exp.eval]) <;>
        (try ring_nf at *) <;>
        (try norm_num at *) <;>
        (try aesop)
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Exp.eval]
        <;>
        ring_nf at *
        <;>
        norm_num at *
        <;>
        aesop
      })

have h₁ : Circuit.eval (Circuit.assert_range w e c) = Circuit.eval c := by
      simp [Circuit.eval]
    have h₂ : Cs.eval (to_cs (Circuit.assert_range w e c)) = Cs.eval (to_cs c) := by
      simp [to_cs]
    have h₃ : wrap (to_wg (Circuit.assert_range w e c)) (to_cs (Circuit.assert_range w e c)) = wrap (to_wg c) (to_cs c) := by
      simp [to_wg, to_cs, wrap]
      <;>
      induction w <;> simp_all [Vector.cons, Vector.tail, Vector.append] <;>
      simp_all [List.map, List.bind, List.cons, List.nil] <;>
      try ring_nf at * <;>
      try norm_num at * <;>
      try aesop
    simp_all [h₁, h₂, h₃]
    <;> rfl
(Clap.to_cs p inst✝ (ZMod p) (Circuit.assert_range e c h)))
